card.name: Return to Essence
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Counter target triggered ability. If an ability of a creature was countered this way, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Weep
card.text: Exile target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Mezzan, Crowned by the Cosmos
card.text: Exploring — Mezzan enters with an additional loyalty counter on it for each differently named land you control. [+1]: You gain 2 life. [-3]: Create a tapped token that's a copy of target land you control. [-5]: Put two +1/+1 counters on each land you control. They become 0/0 creatures until your next turn.

card.name: Cave of Oracles
card.text: When Cave of Oracles enters, you get {VU}. (Spend {V} to cast copies of Vertex spells.) Whenever your complexity is three or greater, up to one other target permanent you control becomes a 0/0 creature until end of turn. Put two +1/+1 counters on it. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Your complexity is the number of spells you've cast and nonland abilities you've activated this turn.)

card.name: Mind Trinity
card.text: When Mind Trinity enters or attacks, if it's not a token, create a token that's a copy of target creature, then exile that token. Warp {1}{I} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Tenzel, Contained by Frost
card.text: Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this planeswalker at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) [+1]: The next time target creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. [-1]: Create a 2/1 blue Spirit creature token with flying. [-2]: Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. For as long as it remains tapped, it loses all abilities.

card.name: Mindsinger
card.text: When Mindsinger enters, you mill two cards and gain 2 life. When Mindsinger dies, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Urwrapir Watchers
card.text: Bake (When this enters, up to one target permanent gains its abilities until end of turn.) Haste Whenever Urwrapir Watchers attacks, you get an amount of {V} equal to your complexity. (Spend {V} to cast copies of Vertex spells. Your complexity is the number of spells you've cast and nonland abilities you've activated this turn.)

card.name: Kussa Voz, Otherworldly Heir
card.text: Heir—You have thirteen or more cards in your sanctum. (If this card is your chosen heir in your sanctum, you may replace a draw with this card if you've met its condition.) Menace Whenever one or more cards enter or leave your sanctum, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Sift Through Stars
card.text: Mill two cards, then draw a card. Flashback—{1}{B}, Discard a card (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Emissary of the Beyond
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, Emissary of the Beyond deals 1 damage to each opponent. [+1]: Exile the top card of your library. You may cast it until end of turn. [-2]: Create a 1/1 red Horror creature token. Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Melt Worlds
card.text: Exploring — Choose one for each differently named land you control. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Target player exiles the top card of your library. They may play it this turn. • Destroy target artifact. • Melt Worlds deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Sellon, Otherworldly Strength
card.text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead. [+1]: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. It gains trample until end of turn. [-3]: Draw a card for each creature you control with power greater than its base power. [-5]: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

card.name: Insidious Mimic
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) As Insidious Mimic enters, choose a creature type. Whenever another creature you control of the chosen type enters, you may have this creature's base size become that creature's base size until end of turn.

card.name: The Earthbound Brushwoods
card.text: When The Earthbound Brushwoods enters, search your library for a land card with a nonbasic land type, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {6}: Target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put two +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: The Icefire Monuments
card.text: If an opponent would lose life, they lose that much life plus one instead. (Damage causes loss of life. Dealing combat damage is one instance of life loss.)

card.name: The Moonlight Shadows
card.text: Whenever a creature enters under your control, you may liberate it. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: The Sunlit Pools
card.text: Whenever a creature is returned to a hand or library from the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of that creature.

card.name: The Sunset Undergrowth
card.text: When The Sunset Undergrowth enters, return target permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Sun's Ardor
card.text: Flying When Sun's Ardor enters, pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.) Exhaust — Exile a creature you control: Put two +1/+1 counters on Sun's Ardor. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Call of the Sky
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Skypiercer
card.text: Lifelink Once during each of your turns, if you would gain life, you may pursue Wonder instead. (To pursue Wonder, reveal a basic land or Wonder card you own from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Call of the Sea
card.text: Draw a card, then pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.) Discard a card.

card.name: Abyssal Pursuer
card.text: Whenever Abyssal Pursuer attacks, you may discard a card and pursue Wonder. When you do, if a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of attacking creatures was revealed this way, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. (To pursue Wonder, reveal a basic land or Wonder card you own from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Monument to Lapsed Worlds
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}{C}{C}. Whenever you spend five or more mana to cast a spell, create a 2/2 colorless Avatar creature token.

card.name: Nasahar, Voidbringer
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, if that player has one or fewer cards in hand, they lose 3 life. [+1]: Each player discards a card. [-1]: You draw a card and gain 2 life. [-X]: Exile target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Ego Robber
card.text: You may cast Ego Robber from your sanctum. (It can't start there.) [+1]: Sift 1. Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. [-2]: Target creature gets +3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Namel, Blade of Oracles
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. [+1]: Create a 1/1 white Avatar creature token. [-2]: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power. [-7]: You get an emblem with "If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead."

card.name: Contorted Expression
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile each player's graveyard and reserves. Warp {1}{C} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Dream Prophet
card.text: Whenever Dream Prophet deals excess damage to a permanent, pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Spirit CC01
card.text: Flying
